message:
feat: add depth borders for subagent nesting, show agent name only on header

Replace indent-based nesting with ink Box left-border for visual
hierarchy. Delegation start/end use ┌─/└─ box-drawing chars.
Agent name only appears on the delegation start (header) line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
